title: DM Assistant Bridge
description: Imports content from a running dm-assistant instance into your Foundry world — NPCs as Actors, shops and locations as Journal Entries, with first-class support for Campaign Codex when installed.

recommends.reason: When Campaign Codex is installed, the bridge routes imports through CC's richer sheet types (npc / shop / location / group). When absent, falls back to native Foundry actors / journals.

dm-assistant-bridge.comment: Probed against dm-assistant's GET /foundry/health on startup. Status indicator goes red when the running dm-assistant is older than this; import is disabled until the operator upgrades.
